title: [SimplifyCFG] process prof data when remove case in umin
author: HerrCai0907
description:
In #164097, we introduce a optimization for umin. But it does not handle profile data correctly.
This PR remove profile data when remove cases.
Fixed: #181837

tests.test_body:
declare void @a()

declare void @b()

define void @switch_remove_dead_cases(i32 %x) {
  %min = call i32 @llvm.umin.i32(i32 %x, i32 4)
  switch i32 %min, label %unreachable [
    i32 2, label %case_a
    i32 3, label %case_b
    i32 4, label %case_ret
    i32 5, label %case_ret
  ], !prof !0

case_a:                                           ; preds = %0
  call void @a()
  ret void

case_b:                                           ; preds = %0
  call void @b()
  ret void

case_ret:                                         ; preds = %0, %0
  ret void

unreachable:                                      ; preds = %0
  unreachable
}

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare i32 @llvm.umin.i32(i32, i32) #0

attributes #0 = { nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none) }

!0 = !{!"branch_weights", i32 11, i32 12, i32 13, i32 14, i32 15}
